detail.description: Yoán Moncada singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Nolan Schanuel scores.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to catcher Edgar Quero, deflected by pitcher Erick Fedde.
Yoán Moncada doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Myles Straw. Mike Trout scores. Jo Adell to 3rd. Jorge Soler to 2nd.
Yoán Moncada singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr.
Yoán Moncada homers (3) on a fly ball to center field.
Yoán Moncada homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge. Jorge Soler scores. Vaughn Grissom scores. Logan O'Hoppe to 2nd.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge.
Yoán Moncada singles on a ground ball to shortstop José Caballero. Jorge Soler to 2nd.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone.
Yoán Moncada singles on a line drive to right fielder Starling Marte.
Yoán Moncada singles on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel.
Yoán Moncada triples (1) on a line drive to left fielder Spencer Steer.
Yoán Moncada singles on a fly ball to shortstop Elly De La Cruz, deflected by left fielder Spencer Steer. Jorge Soler scores.
Yoán Moncada singles on a fly ball to right fielder Addison Barger. Jo Adell to 2nd.
Yoán Moncada singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Addison Barger. Jorge Soler to 3rd.
Yoán Moncada singles on a fly ball to left fielder Ian Happ.
Yoán Moncada homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jorge Soler scores.
Yoán Moncada singles on a soft ground ball to shortstop Carlos Correa.
Yoán Moncada singles on a line drive to center fielder Daniel Schneemann.
